introSection:
Lucy's Crabbie Cabbies (previously known as Taxi Jam before 2015) is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at California's Great America in Santa Clara, California, USA. It opened in 1999 and features taxi-themed trains.

The ride is named after Peanuts character Lucy van Pelt.
fullText:
Lucy's Crabbie Cabbies (previously known as Taxi Jam before 2015) is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at California's Great America in Santa Clara, California, USA. It opened in 1999 and features taxi-themed trains.

The ride is named after Peanuts character Lucy van Pelt.
